ast.source: The max number of the tokens that will be generated (1000 tokens ~ 750 words)
ast.target: 将生成的最大令牌数（约1000个令牌 ≈ 750个单词）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unexpected error in cache refresh loop:
ast.target: 缓存刷新循环中出现意外错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Both LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE and the legacy OTEL_ENABLED / LANGSMITH_OTEL_ENABLED env vars are set. LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE takes precedence.
ast.target: 同时设置了 LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE 和旧版 OTEL_ENABLED / LANGSMITH_OTEL_ENABLED 环境变量。LANGSMITH_TRACING_MODE 优先。

ast.name: warn
warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [警告]：在手动刷新模式下进行跟踪时，您必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 来提交跟踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS – must be valid JSON array of objects with api_url and api_key properties, or object mapping url->apiKey
ast.target: 无效的 LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS – 必须是包含 api_url 和 api_key 属性的有效 JSON 对象数组，或 url->apiKey 的映射对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING] Attempting to use Zod 4 schema in a context where Zod 3 schema is expected. This may cause unexpected behavior.
ast.target: [警告] 尝试在期望 Zod 3 schema 的上下文中使用 Zod 4 schema。这可能导致意外行为。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持 schema 中的记录！请尝试改用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的 schema！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided runId will be used only for the first element of the batch.
ast.target: 提供的 runId 将仅用于批次的第一个元素。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 无法计算令牌数，回退到近似计数

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
[WARN]: 'NodeInterrupt' thrown in conditional edge. This is likely a bug in your graph implementation.
NodeInterrupt should only be thrown inside a node, not in edge conditions.
ast.target: [警告]：在条件边中抛出了 'NodeInterrupt'。这可能是您图实现中的一个错误。\nNodeInterrupt 应仅在节点内部抛出，而非在边条件中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Adding an edge to a graph that has already been compiled. This will not be reflected in the compiled graph.
ast.target: 向已编译的图添加边。此更改不会反映在已编译的图中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: maxTokensBeforeSummary is deprecated. Use `trigger: { tokens: value }` instead.
ast.target: maxTokensBeforeSummary 已弃用。请改用 `trigger: { tokens: value }`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: messagesToKeep is deprecated. Use `keep: { messages: value }` instead.
ast.target: messagesToKeep 已弃用。请改用 `keep: { messages: value }`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: DEPRECATED: piiRedactionMiddleware is deprecated. Please use piiMiddleware instead, go to https://docs.langchain.com/oss/javascript/langchain/middleware/built-in#pii-detection for more information.
ast.target: 已弃用：piiRedactionMiddleware 已弃用。请改用 piiMiddleware，更多信息请访问 https://docs.langchain.com/oss/javascript/langchain/middleware/built-in#pii-detection。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: triggerTokens is deprecated. Use `trigger: { tokens: value }` instead.
ast.target: triggerTokens 已弃用。请改用 `trigger: { tokens: value }`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keepMessages is deprecated. Use `keep: { messages: value }` instead.
ast.target: keepMessages 已弃用。请改用 `keep: { messages: value }`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: clearAtLeast is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. It conflicts with the `keep` property. Use `keep: { tokens: value }` or `keep: { messages: value }` instead to control retention.
ast.target: clearAtLeast 已弃用，并将在未来版本中移除。它与 `keep` 属性冲突。请改用 `keep: { tokens: value }` 或 `keep: { messages: value }` 来控制保留策略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The 'throw' exit behavior is deprecated. Please use 'error' instead.
ast.target: 'throw' 退出行为已弃用。请改用 'error'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `load` is depreciated and should be removed from code (workers now come pre-loaded)
ast.target: `load` 已弃用，应从代码中移除（工作者现在已预加载）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请查阅 addKeyword 的文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: 以映射形式传递 keywords 选项已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: OpenAI may require a filename for file uploads. Specify a filename in the content block metadata, e.g.: { type: 'file', mimeType: '...', data: '...', metadata: { filename: 'my-file.pdf' } }. Using placeholder filename 'LC_AUTOGENERATED'.
ast.target: OpenAI 可能要求为文件上传指定文件名。请在内容块元数据中指定文件名，例如：{ type: 'file', mimeType: '...', data: '...', metadata: { filename: 'my-file.pdf' } }。将使用占位符文件名 'LC_AUTOGENERATED'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Using a model URL is deprecated, please use the `endpointUrl` parameter instead
ast.target: 使用模型 URL 已弃用，请改用 `endpointUrl` 参数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Anthropic: The `compactionControl` parameter is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use server-side compaction instead by passing `edits: [{ type: "compact_20260112" }]` in the params passed to `toolRunner()`. See https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction
ast.target: Anthropic：`compactionControl` 参数已弃用，将在未来版本中移除。请通过在传递给 `toolRunner()` 的参数中传递 `edits: [{ type: \"compact_20260112\" }]` 来使用服务器端压缩。参见 https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction

ast.name: warn
ast.source: "jsonMode" is not supported for Anthropic models. Falling back to "jsonSchema".
ast.target: Anthropic 模型不支持 \"jsonMode\"。将回退到 \"jsonSchema\"。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The follow-redirects package should be excluded from browser builds.
ast.target: follow-redirects 包应从浏览器构建中排除。

ast.target: 通过执行鼠标点击、键盘输入、滚动和其他操作来控制计算机界面。

ast.target: 在本地机器上执行 shell 命令。命令以 argv 令牌形式提供。

ast.source: Execute shell commands in a managed environment. Commands can be run concurrently.

ast.source: EXPERIMENTAL: adds the images that are referenced in the request, IT MIGHT CONSUME ALOT OF TOKENS
ast.target: 实验性：添加请求中引用的图像，这可能会消耗大量令牌

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path To Folder that Text Generator can put Backups,generations...etc into
ast.target: 文本生成器可以放置备份、生成内容等的文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Some changes might require you to reload the plugins
ast.target: 某些更改可能需要您重新加载插件

ast.name: description
ast.source: It will delete all your configurations
ast.target: 这将删除您的所有配置

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is the account settings to manage bought items from the package-manager
ast.target: 这是用于管理从包管理器购买的项目的账户设置

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the chat completion. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length. (1000 tokens ~ 750 words)
ast.target: 在聊天补全中生成的最大令牌数。输入令牌和生成令牌的总长度受模型上下文长度限制。（1000 个令牌 ≈ 750 个单词）

ast.name: description
ast.source: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
ast.target: 要使用的采样温度，介于 0 和 2 之间。较高的值（如 0.8）会使输出更随机，而较低的值（如 0.2）会使输出更集中和确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.
ast.target: 介于 -2.0 和 2.0 之间的数字。正值会根据新令牌是否出现在迄今为止的文本中对其进行惩罚，从而增加模型谈论新话题的可能性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timeout in milliseconds. If the request takes longer than the timeout, the request will be aborted. (default: 5000ms)
ast.target: 超时时间（毫秒）。如果请求花费的时间超过超时时间，请求将被中止。（默认：5000ms）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prefix to add to the beginning of the completion (default: '\n\n')
ast.target: 添加到补全开头的前缀（默认：'\\n\\n'）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls how much effort the model spends on reasoning
ast.target: 控制模型在推理上花费多少精力

ast.name: description
ast.source: enable this only if you get blocked by CORS, in mobile this will result in failure in some functions
ast.target: 仅当您被 CORS 阻止时才启用此选项，在移动设备上这将导致某些功能失败

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include the title of the active document in the considered context.
ast.target: 在考虑的上下文中包含活动文档的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include starred blocks in the considered context.
ast.target: 在考虑的上下文中包含星标块。

ast.source: Include the content of internal md links on the page.
ast.target: 包含页面上内部 Markdown 链接的内容。

ast.target: 您可以自定义生成标题的提示词

ast.name: description
ast.source: tg_selection stopping character. Empty means disabled. Default: ^\*\*\*
ast.target: tg_selection 停止字符。留空表示禁用。默认值：^\\*\\*\\*

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only enable this if you trust the authors of the templates, or know what you're doing.
ast.target: 仅在您信任模板作者或清楚自己在做什么时才启用此选项。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 启用或禁用 PDF 提取器。

ast.target: 启用或禁用网页提取器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable audio extractor using Whisper OpenAI ($0.006 / minute) supports multi-languages and accepts a variety of formats (m4a, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, wav, webm).
ast.target: 启用或禁用使用 Whisper OpenAI 的音频提取器（每分钟 0.006 美元），支持多种语言并接受多种格式（m4a, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, wav, webm）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable Image Extractor from URL
ast.target: 启用或禁用从 URL 提取图像

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable Embedded Image Extractor.
ast.target: 启用或禁用嵌入式图像提取器。

ast.target: 启用或禁用 YouTube 提取器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shows the suggestions text in the editor (EXPERIMENTAL)
ast.target: 在编辑器中显示建议文本（实验性）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shows the suggestions text compiled as markdown, may shows weird spaces at the begining and end (EXPERIMENTAL)
ast.target: 显示编译为 Markdown 的建议文本，开头和结尾可能会出现奇怪的空格（实验性）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Overrides the trigger when suggestion is accepted (default: *single space*)
ast.target: 当建议被接受时覆盖触发器（默认：*单空格*）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter the number of suggestions to generate. Please note that increasing this value may significantly increase the cost of usage with GPT-3.
ast.target: 输入要生成的建议数量。请注意，增加此值可能会显著增加使用 GPT-3 的成本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter the stop phrase to use for generating auto-suggestions. The generation will stop when the stop phrase is found. (Use a space for words, a period for sentences, and a newline for paragraphs.)
ast.target: 输入用于生成自动建议的停止短语。当找到停止短语时，生成将停止。（使用空格分隔单词，句号分隔句子，换行符分隔段落。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will allow it to run at the beggining of a new line
ast.target: 这将允许它在新行的开头运行

ast.name: description
ast.target: 您可以自定义自动建议的提示词

ast.name: description
ast.source:
use a different LLM provider than the one you're generating with.          
            make sure to setup the llm provider in the LLM Settings, before use.
ast.target: 使用与您正在生成的模型不同的 LLM 提供商。\n            请确保在使用前在 LLM 设置中设置好 LLM 提供商。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 启用密钥加密，这可能导致与移动设备不兼容

ast.target: 思考过程的最大 token 数（1,024 - 100,000）

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The portion of text that has been selected by the user.
ast.target: 用户已选择的文本部分。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The text selected using the text generator method.
ast.target: 使用文本生成方法选择的文本。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the inverse selection (excluding the currently selected text) is empty.
ast.target: 当反向选择（排除当前选定文本）为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the previous word relative to the cursor's position is empty.
ast.target: 当光标位置之前的单词为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the next word relative to the cursor's position is empty.
ast.target: 当光标位置之后的单词为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the paragraph where the cursor is currently located is empty.
ast.target: 当光标当前所在的段落为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the sentence surrounding the cursor is empty.
ast.target: 当光标周围的句子为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the text before the cursor's current position is empty.
ast.target: 当光标当前位置之前的文本为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows an error notice when the text after the cursor's current position is empty.
ast.target: 当光标当前位置之后的文本为空时显示错误通知。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Content under headings marked with a star (*) in the note.
ast.target: 笔记中标有星号 (*) 的标题下的内容。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The current content copied to the clipboard.
ast.target: 当前复制到剪贴板的内容。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: All selected text segments in the note, especially when multiple selections are made.
ast.target: 笔记中所有选定的文本段，特别是进行多重选择时。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Highlighted segments marked with ==...== in the note.
ast.target: 笔记中用 ==...== 标记的高亮段。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: An array of notes or sub-notes that are cited or related to the primary note.
ast.target: 被引用或与主笔记相关的笔记或子笔记数组。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Mentions across the entire vault where a note is directly linked, e.g., [[note]].
ast.target: 整个库中直接链接笔记的提及，例如 [[note]]。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Mentions across the vault where a note is referenced without a direct link, e.g., '...note...'.
ast.target: 整个库中未直接链接但被引用的笔记的提及，例如 '...note...'。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Contains all the headings within the note and their respective content.
ast.target: 包含笔记中的所有标题及其各自的内容。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The initial metadata of the note, often provided in YAML format.
ast.target: 笔记的初始元数据，通常以 YAML 格式提供。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The initial metadata (Object) of the note.
ast.target: 笔记的初始元数据（对象）。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Extracts content from various sources like PDFs, images, audio files, web pages, and YouTube URLs. possible values: web_md, web_html, pdf, yt, img, audio
ast.target: 从各种来源提取内容，如 PDF、图像、音频文件、网页和 YouTube URL。可能的值：web_md, web_html, pdf, yt, img, audio

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Reads the content of a file from the vault

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Writes a text or variable into a file
ast.target: 将文本或变量写入文件

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Appends a text or variable into a file
ast.target: 将文本或变量追加到文件

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Runs another template, and sending a value to it, the result will be stored in a variable(var1).
ast.target: 运行另一个模板，并向其发送一个值，结果将存储在变量 (var1) 中。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Runs javascript code, avoid using it for security reasons.
ast.target: 运行 JavaScript 代码，出于安全原因请避免使用。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Logs anything to console (open console in devtools Ctrl+Shift+i)
ast.target: 将任何内容记录到控制台（在开发者工具中打开控制台 Ctrl+Shift+i）

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows a notice to the user

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Shows a error notice to the user, and it will stop the execution.
ast.target: 向用户显示错误通知，并将停止执行。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Gives access to generic provider's api keys
ast.target: 访问通用提供商的 API 密钥

ast.name: hint
ast.source: first 255 letters of trimmed content of the note
ast.target: 笔记修剪后内容的前 255 个字母

ast.name: hint
ast.target: 触发自动建议的查询文本

ast.name: message
ast.source: At least one of fraction, tokens, or messages must be provided
ast.target: 必须提供分数、token 或消息中的至少一个

ast.name: message
ast.source: Exactly one of fraction, tokens, or messages must be provided
ast.target: 必须恰好提供分数、token 或消息中的一个

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须恰好匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: expected a Blob, File or Blob-like object
ast.target: 期望一个 Blob、File 或类似 Blob 的对象
